title: coap_status.c: format_ipv6 now uses net_addr_ntop - consider shared helper with coap_msg.c
description: After fixing snprintf truncation in format_ipv6 by switching to net_addr_ntop (standard compressed format, no return-value issue), notice duplication with format_ipv6_addr in coap_msg.c. Both do similar IPv6 formatting. P3 codereview finding. Should extract to lichen/coap/common or similar.
notes: Commit: d8f73ea (extracted lichen_coap_format_ipv6 to coap_status.h/.c; updated coap_msg.c and Kconfig for dependency; calls now use shared helper with consistent -ENOBUFS error; duplication removed)
close_reason: Extracted shared lichen_coap_format_ipv6 to coap_status.h + impl in coap_status.c (updated all call sites); removed duplicate from coap_msg.c + updated calls and include; added select LICHEN_COAP_STATUS to Kconfig for MSG to ensure symbol availability; verified calls and no dead code. Matches bead description.
